meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Build SaaS Apps Without Coding
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no-code limitations. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade SaaS applications in record time.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap for non-coders by providing a production-ready, modular architecture. By pairing it with Claude Code, you translate natural language requirements into clean, executable codebases. This workflow eliminates technical debt, automates boilerplate setup, and empowers freelancers to ship complex SaaS products faster than ever.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s graveyard. You have a vision for a high-converting SaaS, but the wall of syntax and architectural complexity stands between you and your first paying client. You’ve outgrown drag-and-drop builders, yet traditional development feels like a slow, painful grind that kills your margins.

Relief has arrived. The Antigravity project template acts as your structural blueprint, providing a hardened foundation that handles the heavy lifting. When combined with the reasoning power of Claude Code, you transform from a frustrated non-coder into a high-velocity AI Architect, shipping professional software while your competition is still fighting with documentation.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the core directory structure and environment configuration to ensure modularity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity base template. Set up a secure environment with authentication, database ORM, and API route handling.

steps.title: Define Schema and Data Models
steps.description: Translate your business requirements into a robust database schema without writing manual SQL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a SaaS platform including Users, Subscriptions, and Project entities. Define clear relationships and indexes for performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Define database schema for user auth and project tracking'

steps.title: Build Functional UI Components
steps.description: Generate responsive, accessible interface components using the template's integrated design system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a dashboard layout with a sidebar navigation, data table for projects, and a modal for creating new entries using Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ui 'Create a responsive dashboard with a sidebar and project table'

steps.title: Implement API Business Logic
steps.description: Hook up your frontend to backend services to enable real-world application functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write secure API handlers for creating and retrieving project data. Implement error handling and request validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement CRUD API endpoints for project management'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize the build and push to a staging environment for client review.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the codebase for deployment readiness, optimize assets, and generate a Vercel-compatible configuration.

pro_tips: Treat your Antigravity prompt like a project requirement document; the more context you provide about business logic, the better the output.
Use Claude Code's 'review' feature before every commit to catch edge cases in authentication flows.
Keep your UI components atomic; smaller components are easier for AI to refactor later without breaking the global state.
Leverage the Antigravity 'middleware' folder to handle global permissions, saving you from writing repetitive auth checks in every route.
Always run a dry-run test suite after AI-generated updates to verify that the core business logic remains intact.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin A/B testing your landing page components and monitor your error logs for user-side bugs to iterate rapidly.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical barriers dictate your earnings. With the Antigravity template, you are no longer just a freelancer—you are a software production house. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
